title: $1,000 in Tesla at Start of 2012
description: What $1,000 invested in Tesla on January 3, 2012 would be worth today. Tesla was trading at ~$6.33 (split-adjusted) and had not yet proven it could deliver the Model S at scale. Profitability was years away. The stock would rise over 3,000% before its first split.
dividend_note: Tesla has never paid a dividend.
max_drawdown_note: Tesla fell ~73% between November 2021 and January 2023, from ~$400 to ~$108.
educational_note: Tesla's two splits turned 158 shares into 2,370. The company traded below its IPO price multiple times in 2012-2013. Investors who held through the 73% drawdown in 2022-2023 recovered and surpassed prior highs.
